race.description: Jarrod Arentz Electrical Solar Solutions (Bm66) Hcp
race.comment: VIVACISSIMO (7) is ready to win after she just missed last time, beaten a long neck into third over 1500m at Caulfield Heath. Has her share of ability and should prove hard to beat in this suitable race. BOLTSAVER (6) ran on strongly only to just miss last start over 1400m at Warrnambool. Will derive great benefit from recent racing. Placed to advantage so expect another forward showing. JOINT THE QUE (11) is the most lightly-raced horse in the race, but looks a progressive type and the Clever Trevor form looks good after he won at Caulfield last Saturday. BRAVE MISSION (3) is an import resuming from a spell of nine months and having his first run for the Henry Dwyer yard. Was in the placings when first-up from a spell last campaign at Ascot over 1408m. Will be forward for this after a recent trial win at Horsham. BUDJIK BOY (1) just missed out first up in a handy race at Warrnambool during the carnival and he's a second-up winner in the past.
